prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='CWT_svr', seasonality_champion='ONLY_CWT_catboost', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.83) and high seasonality capture variance (0.77), with early horizon specialists (ONLY_CWT_catboost, ONLY_CWT_rf) differing from late horizon specialists (ONLY_FT_catboost, catboost). The true series exhibits mixed trend directions across folds. These conditions strongly support DBA combination to leverage model diversity while mitigating individual weaknesses.

raw.pattern_analyst:

  "tier2_models": ["ONLY_CWT_rf", "FT_catboost", "ETS", "DWT_rf", "ONLY_DWT_rf", "ONLY_FT_rf", "ONLY_DWT_svr", "rf"],
  "recommended_method_hint": "dba_combination",
  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",

    "high_disagreement": true,

  },
  "cot_narrative": "Analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.83) and high seasonality capture variance (0.77), with early horizon specialists (ONLY_CWT_catboost, ONLY_CWT_rf) differing from late horizon specialists (ONLY_FT_catboost, catboost). The true series exhibits mixed trend directions across folds. These conditions strongly support DBA combination to leverage model diversity while mitigating individual weaknesses."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.83) and high seasonality capture variance (0.77), with early horizon specialists (ONLY_CWT_catboost, ONLY_CWT_rf) differing from late horizon specialists (ONLY_FT_catboost, catboost). The true series exhibits mixed trend directions across folds. These conditions strongly support DBA combination to leverage model diversity while mitigating individual weaknesses.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=10 indicates high model diversity requiring per-horizon selection methods. relative_spread_mean=0.648 (≥0.25) strongly supports dba_combination as recommended by pattern_analyst_insights. With n_windows=3, small top_k=3 and shrinkage=0.25 prevents overfitting. RMSE spread between best (ONLY_CWT_catboost: 37.28) and worst (NaiveSeasonal: 64.44) is extreme (0.83 ratio), favoring robust combination methods over simple mean.
